sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n104168" key="toioutognw/mwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τοιουτογνώμων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, <sense id="n104168.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">minded in such manner, An.Ox.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4066.tlg003:4:32" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.32</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Tz.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Hermog.</title_> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
